title: DRM Infrastructure Uplift
description: Upgrade content protection from Widevine L3 to L1 hardware-backed DRM to unlock studio premium catalogue licensing. Covers backend key server, device attestation, and mobile SDK certification.

title: Integrate Google Play Integrity API for Android device attestation
description: Implement Android device attestation using Google Play Integrity API to verify hardware TEE support before issuing Widevine L1 licenses.

title: Upgrade key server to support Google License Proxy Auth (LPA) protocol
description: The existing DRMtoday-based key server must be updated to handle LPA protocol required for Widevine L1. Includes active-active HA deployment across two AWS regions.

title: Apple FairPlay KSM certification submission
description: Submit Apple Key Server Module integration for FairPlay L1 certification. Estimated Apple review time 4–6 weeks.

title: ABR player quality preference setting
description: Add user-facing quality preference to the video player: 'Prefer quality (allow brief buffers)' vs 'Prefer smooth (allow lower quality)'. Expose minimum quality floor setting.

title: Continue Watching row shows titles user has explicitly dismissed
description: Users who stop watching a title cannot remove it from Continue Watching. The row shows stale and unwanted content, causing UX frustration and passive churn.

title: Subtitle and audio language preference persistence
description: Save subtitle language, audio language, and subtitle styling preferences at the profile level. Currently resets to default on every new title.

title: Hybrid Recommendation Engine
description: Replace pure collaborative filtering with a hybrid model combining content-based features (metadata, mood, theme) and collaborative signals. Addresses cold-start problem for long-tail catalogue.

title: AI-powered content metadata enrichment pipeline
description: Build batch enrichment pipeline using Claude API to generate standardised genre, mood, and thematic keyword tags from title synopsis, reviews, and cast/crew data. Target: 60,000 titles initial batch.

title: API gateway rate limiting and circuit breakers
description: Implement per-consumer-key rate limiting and circuit breaker patterns on the partner API gateway. Required before Q3 partner expansion (5 new partners onboarding).

title: Service-to-service token rotation with HashiCorp Vault
description: Replace manually shared long-lived tokens with automated short-lived machine tokens (15-min lifetime) using HashiCorp Vault. SEC-04 compliance required.

title: OpenTelemetry distributed tracing across microservices
description: Instrument all services with OpenTelemetry SDK. Single trace view in Grafana Tempo replacing 5 separate Kibana dashboards. Required for incident response SLA.

title: SSAI Pipeline for Ad-Supported Tier
description: Build Server-Side Ad Insertion pipeline for Q3 ad-supported tier launch. Evaluate AWS Elemental MediaTailor vs Yospace. Contextual ad signals only (no PII to ad networks).

title: CMAF packaging migration for VOD content
description: Migrate VOD transcoding pipeline from dual HLS+DASH outputs to CMAF. Estimated 45% storage reduction (12PB → ~6.5PB). Requires player SDK updates for older devices.

title: Download resume failure on Android (30% corruption rate)
description: Offline download on Android fails to resume after network interruption, corrupting ~30% of partial downloads. Root cause: download chunk manager does not support range requests for DRM-encrypted segments.
